arts.ttl: Liverpool, Arsenal, Aston Villa & Man City Possible Champions League Round of 16 Draws
arts.sum: All five British clubs made it through the League Phase of the Champions League - and now have a better idea of who they'll face in the next stage.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals huge Arsenal injury scare ahead of crunch Man City clash
arts.sum: Arsenal are safely through to the next round of the Champions League but David Raya was absent for their win over Girona and is a doubt for Sunday's meeting with Manchester City

arts.ttl: Arsenal to make second bid for Watkins - Thursday's gossip
arts.sum: Arsenal to make second bid for Ollie Watkins, Manchester United hold talks with Barcelona over Marcus Rashford loan move, Tottenham, Bayern Munich and Borussia Dortmund want Tyler Dibling, plus more.

arts.ttl: Girona 1-2 Arsenal: Match report & 5 talking points as Nwaneri steals limelight
arts.sum: Full analysis and Arsenal talking points after safe progression past Girona on the final matchday of the Champions League league phase.

arts.ttl: £40m striker waves goodbye to fans after Champions League match following links with Tottenham and Arsenal
arts.sum: In the space of around 24 hours, Mathys Tel is suddenly a name that both Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur fans can’t stop discussing around north...

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins sends clear Arsenal transfer message as Aston Villa exit stance revealed
arts.sum: Despite a bid from Emirates Stadium for his services having been rejected, Unai Emery continued to stick by his striker and named him in the starting XI for the Champions League clash against Celtic on Wednesday. When asked ahead of the game about one of Duran or Watkins leaving, Emery said: "It is not only with Jhon Duran but other players as well.

arts.ttl: Arsenal player ratings vs Girona: Ethan Nwaneri proves best Bukayo Saka replacement but Neto shaky on debut
arts.sum: Gunners’ ascending teenage star marks his first Champions League start with a brilliant winning goal in Spain

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Champions League play-offs and knockout bracket as Premier League quartet learn fate
arts.sum: All 36 teams competing in this year's new-look Champions League played their final league fixture, with some banking a play-off place and others moving through to the Round of 16

arts.ttl: Arsenal teenager Ethan Nwaneri scores winner at Girona on full CL debut
arts.sum: The Gunners secured direct passage to the last 16.

arts.ttl: Tyrell Malacia on Celtic transfer 'watchlist' as Man Utd man lined up for Kieran Tierney January alternative
arts.sum: The Dutchman is said to be on a list of targets if the Scottish champions fail to land Tierney from Arsenal this month
